candidate_answers.location_sharing: no-background-sharing; public provider locality/service-area only under approved rules
candidate_answers.purchases: provider subscriptions are architected but real payments remain disabled in preauthorization

target_audience.reason: The marketplace involves service contracting, provider evidence, complaints and potential commercial subscriptions; it is not designed for children.

devices.tablet_distribution: manual-device-catalog-review-required-before-enabling; no tablet-specific Play claim is made

testing_tracks.closed: required-before-production-rollout; actual tester rules depend on developer-account type and current Play requirements

required_checks: correct Personal versus Organization account type for the operating entity
organization D-U-N-S and organization verification if an Organization account is used
physical Android device verification if required for the account
closed-testing eligibility rules if the account is a newly created Personal account

submission_boundary: This inventory prepares answers; it does not submit an IARC questionnaire, declare a target audience in Play Console, verify a developer account, create a testing track or grant production access.
